businessBackground: The Trade Desk is a global leader in advertising technology, operating a self-service, cloud-based demand-side platform (DSP) for programmatic digital advertising. Founded November 2009 in Ventura, California (originally incorporated in Delaware; reincorporated in Nevada in 2024). IPO'd September 21, 2016 on Nasdaq. The company empowers ad buyers to create, manage, and optimize data-driven digital advertising campaigns across ad formats, channels, and devices.

V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: Kokai at 100% adoption drives take-rate expansion (20.3% → 21.6% FY2025); CEO Performance Option fully amortizes Q1 2026 → SBC/rev mechanically compresses 16.9% → ~12-13%, creating GAAP EPS step-function (+$0.11-0.14/sh); FY2025 FCF $796M; international +35% vs US +16%. Governance yellow flag (3 CFOs in 18 months) limits to 4/5. Management alignment: $148M Green open-market purchase Mar 2026; net diluted share reduction -8.3M FY2025 (first meaningful shrinkage); dual-class limits external accountability but founder capital at risk alongside shareholders.

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: Market at 6.9x fwd EBITDA prices TTD below every non-distressed ad-tech peer (peer range 11.3x–29.6x, median 12.7x). Blended prob-weighted FV $38 vs ~$22 market price (+73%). Even bear case ($23) is above current. EV/EBITDA-only FV $46; Owner Earnings-only FV $25. Market appears to price near-structural-decline scenario. 29 analysts with consensus PTs $43-51 limit informational edge, capping at 4; however, our FV is BELOW consensus because of Owner Earnings application — the analytical edge (SBC cliff timing) is not reflected in any sell-side model found.

V3.name: Identifiable Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: CPG/auto cyclical drag (~25% of revenue) over-extrapolated by market; two guidance disappointments collapsed sentiment; governance overhang adds to selling pressure. All causes TRANSIENT but self-correcting mechanism (Q1 2026 earnings beat + guide) has timing uncertainty. Drawdown Diagnosis:

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: $1.3B net cash (zero debt) + $796M annual FCF provides hard liquidity floor; securities litigation ($400M-$1.3B speculative settlement) absorbed in 6-18 months of FCF. No non-distressed ad-tech peer trades below 10x EV/EBITDA. Soft floor at 7x current fwd EBITDA (~current price) — not hard-asset backed. Binary risk (UID2 adverse privacy ruling) is existential but ~3% probability. Jeff Green MNPI discovery would break thesis.

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: 2-3 conditions required. (1) Q1 2026 beat + constructive guide — UNCONFIRMED (pending May); (2) CPG/auto weakness remains bounded and cyclical, not spreading — UNCONFIRMED; (3) SBC/rev compression post-CEO option cliff — HOLDING (final tranche confirmed Q1 2026). Thesis is thesis-gated at Q1 — concentration risk explicitly flagged.

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: 4-5 independent paths: (1) Q1 beat + guide raise → multiple re-rating toward 17x; (2) SBC cliff → GAAP EPS uplift $0.11-0.14/sh, no sell-side models this; (3) Ventura tier-1 OEM (Samsung/LG/MVPD) → +$5-10/sh in bull; (4) OpenAI partnership → new demand channel; (5) Permanent CFO with strong credentials → governance discount narrows. Three of five paths are already partially in motion (SBC cliff confirmed, Ventura launched, CFO search active).

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: 10 filings reviewed (FY2021-FY2025 10-K + FY2023-FY2025 10-Q) + 20 transcripts + pre-debate research (48 citations from SEC filings, Form 4, court records). Core financial inputs [FACT] from audited filings. Key DATA GAPs: UID2 adoption %, OpenAI status, Ventura OEM pipeline, take-rate driver breakdown (not disclosed by company), securities settlement range speculative. Mix of facts and inferences — RC 2/5 reflects unresolved critical questions.

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: Catalysts specific and dated: Q1 2026 earnings May 8-14 (critical gate); proxy late April 2026 (CEO option details, board composition); NewFronts May 2026 (Ventura CTV strategy); Cannes Lions June 2026 (leadership visibility); Q2 2026 earnings August. Permanent CFO and OpenAI decision TBD — introduces minor timing uncertainty. Three of five debate vectors converge at Q1 — concentration risk but also strong convergence clarity.

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: Prob-weighted FV $38 (+73% from $22); bear case $23 above current; 3-4 legs; floor near current; Parts A-E all TRANSIENT/PARTIALLY-STRUCTURAL-addressable — no cap. 29 analysts compress variant edge.

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: Q1 2026 May 8-14 earnings (EVIDENTIAL tier — 4 consecutive beats precedent) + mechanical SBC cliff (ARITHMETIC tier, $0.11-0.14 GAAP EPS uplift); proxy, NewFronts, Cannes additional catalysts. No full-year guide.

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: 95%+ retention 12yr, 26% indie DSP share, 79% GM, rising take-rate 20.3→21.6%, Kokai shipped 100%. SSP-disintermediation long-tail risk noted. Two holdcos >10% (up from one). Platform ops cost rising 17.8→21.4%.

universal.name: Balance Sheet & Torque (GATE)
universal.rationale: Net cash $1,303M (13% mcap), $796M FCF FY2025, $1.4B buybacks FY2025 (net SO -8.3M, first meaningful shrink), zero debt, $445M undrawn revolver, fortress.
